quote.en: The Metatree team doesn't just talk about AI — they ship it. The Claude Code rollout saved our engineering team weeks per sprint and the team actually uses it, not just talks about it.
quote.zh: Metatree 团队不是在嘴上讲 AI，他们是真的在发货。Claude Code 落地让我们工程团队每个 sprint 省下数周时间，而且团队是真的在用，不是只是在讨论。

role.zh: 金融科技 SaaS · 悉尼
